name: should create a year splits query with player age at time of split
description: Test case for should create a year splits query with player age at time of split
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2020,2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" as materialized (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN recv_yds ELSE 0 END) as rec_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."rec_yds_from_plays" AS "rec_yds_from_plays_0", CASE WHEN player.date_of_birth IS NULL OR player.date_of_birth = '0000-00-00' THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(opening_days.opening_day, TO_DATE(player.date_of_birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) + (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM AGE(opening_days.opening_day, TO_DATE(player.date_of_birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) / 12.0) + (EXTRACT(DAY FROM AGE(opening_days.opening_day, TO_DATE(player.date_of_birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) / 365.25), 2) END as age_0, "player_years"."year", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" on "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8.year = player_years.year and "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."year" in (2023, 2022, 2021, 2020) left join "opening_days" on "opening_days"."year" = "player_years"."year" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."rec_yds_from_plays", player.date_of_birth, opening_days.opening_day, "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
